zh.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook是Roger de Fulbrook和Unknown的女兒，於大約1152年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾福爾布盧可。她於1197年之前與William de Turville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook是Roger de Fulbrook和Unknown的女儿，于大约1152年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾福爾布盧可。她于1197年之前与William de Turville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Fulbrook
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fullbrook
meanings: 1 English: locative name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Fulbrook (Oxon), Fulbrook in Hogshaw (Bucks), Fulbrook in Sherbourne and Fullbrook in Long Compton (both Warwicks), Fulbrocks Farm in Charlwood (Surrey), and a lost Fulbrook in Gloucester (Gloucs).
2 English: locative name perhaps also from Fullbrook Farm in Elstead (Surrey), which is recorded as Fowelesbrok in 1257, Fulbrook in 1603–25.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook was born about 1152, in Fulbrook, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Roger de Fulbrook and Unknown. She married William de Turville before 1197. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1222, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook est née environ 1152, à Fulbrook, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Roger de Fulbrook et Unknown. Elle a épousé William de Turville avant 1197. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1222, dans sa ville natale.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook è nata il circa 1152 nel Fulbrook, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Roger de Fulbrook e Unknown. Lei sposato William de Turville prima del 1197. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 1222, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrookは約1152年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフウルブルークでRoger de FulbrookとUnknownの娘として生まれた。1197年以前にWilliam de Turvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook(은)는 대략 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 프브룩에서 Roger de Fulbrook(와)과 Unknown의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1197년 이전 William de Turville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook nasceu aproximadamente 1152, em Fulbrook, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Roger de Fulbrook e Unknown. Ela casou-se com William de Turville antes 1197. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1222, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulbrook родилась около 1152 г. в местности фьулбрук, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Roger de Fulbrook и Unknown. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Turville перед 1197 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1222 г. в её родном городе.
